s3.securityFlexprice: Your data will be stored securely in Flexprice-managed S3 buckets. Files are encrypted at rest and accessible via secure download links.
s3.securityAws: Your AWS credentials are encrypted and stored securely. We recommend using IAM roles with minimal required permissions for S3 access.

zohoBooks.description: Configure your Zoho Books integration and authorize via OAuth.
zohoBooks.organizationIdHint: Required for Zoho Books API operations.
zohoBooks.accountsServerHint: Default is India (.in). Use another region if needed (e.g. accounts.zoho.com, accounts.zoho.eu).
zohoBooks.webhookBody: In Zoho Books, create Invoice and Contact webhooks and set this URL on each. Use the same secret here and in Zoho so Flexprice can verify X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature.
zohoBooks.webhookSecretPlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep existing secret, or enter a new secret to rotate
zohoBooks.webhookSecretPlaceholderCreate: Same value as in Zoho Books webhook settings
zohoBooks.webhookSecretDescEdit: Stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep the current secret when updating.
zohoBooks.webhookSecretDescCreate: Required. Must match the secret in Zoho Books so Flexprice can verify X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature. Stored encrypted with your connection.
zohoBooks.oauthRedirectBody: This URI must exactly match your Zoho app Authorized Redirect URI and backend oauth redirect configuration.
zohoBooks.webhookBodyHtml: In Zoho Books, create Invoice and Contact webhooks and set this URL on each. Use the same secret here and in Zoho so Flexprice can verify <header>X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature</header>.
zohoBooks.credentialsHidden: OAuth credentials are encrypted and hidden. To update credentials, delete the connection and create a new one.
zohoBooks.selectTenantForUrl: Select tenant and environment to generate URL

quickBooks.qbClientSecretHint: Your QuickBooks OAuth Client Secret from the Developer Dashboard (Keys & Credentials tab)
quickBooks.incomeAccountHint: QuickBooks Income Account ID for Items. If left blank, it defaults to QuickBooks' standard income account (ID: 79).
quickBooks.webhookPaymentEnabled: Configure webhooks in your QuickBooks app to enable payment reconciliation from QuickBooks to Flexprice.
quickBooks.webhookPaymentDisabled: Enable payment sync to configure webhook integration for payment reconciliation.
quickBooks.webhookVerifierPlaceholder: Enter webhook verifier token from QuickBooks
quickBooks.webhookVerifierHint: The webhook verifier token from Intuit Developer Portal for signature verification (recommended for production)
quickBooks.qbWebhookIntro: Set up this webhook URL in your QuickBooks app (Intuit Developer Portal) to receive payment notifications:
quickBooks.qbWebhookEventsIntro: Subscribe to this event in your QuickBooks app (Intuit Developer Portal):
quickBooks.oauthBody: After clicking Create Connection, you will be redirected to QuickBooks to authorize this connection.
quickBooks.oauthClientReady: Make sure you have the Client ID and Client Secret ready from your QuickBooks Dashboard.
quickBooks.oauthImportant: IMPORTANT: You must configure this redirect URI in your QuickBooks' app settings.
quickBooks.oauthImportantRich: <important>IMPORTANT:</important> You must configure this redirect URI in your QuickBooks app settings.
quickBooks.noteEditing: Note: OAuth credentials are encrypted and not displayed for security. To update credentials, delete this connection and create a new one.
quickBooks.qbSetupStep1: Go to your QuickBooks app in Intuit Developer Portal
quickBooks.qbSetupStep5Optional: Copy the webhook verifier token and paste it above (optional but recommended)

exports.exportNotFoundDescription: The requested export task could not be found or has been deleted.
exports.noExportTasksHint: Create your first export task to start syncing data to S3.
exports.noS3ConnectionsHint: Create your first S3 connection to start exporting data.
exports.s3FeatureDataExportBody: Automatically export events, invoices, and other Flexprice data to your S3 bucket on a scheduled basis.
exports.s3FeatureSchedulingBody: Choose between hourly or daily export schedules to match your data processing needs.
exports.s3FeatureSecureBody: Your data is encrypted and securely stored in your own S3 bucket with configurable encryption options.
exports.s3FeatureFormatsBody: Export data in various formats with configurable compression and file size limits for optimal storage efficiency.
exports.overviewIntro: Export your Flexprice data to external storage systems for data warehousing, analytics, and backup purposes. Configure automated exports with flexible scheduling and secure data transfer.
exports.providerAmazonS3Description: Export your Flexprice data to Amazon S3 for data warehousing, analytics, and backup purposes.

integrations.disconnectDescription: This will remove the connection. You can reconnect from the integrations page at any time.
integrations.deleteConnectionConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete the connection "{{name}}"?
integrations.toastPreviewDisconnectMock: Preview only — this is a mock connected state.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Send invoices, calculate tax, and collect payments using our native connector to Stripe.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Stripe app enables invoicing, tax collection, and payment via Stripe.

stripeInvoicing.title: Stripe Invoicing
paragraphs: Create and send invoices through Stripe Invoicing directly from Flexprice and automatically collect payments.

automaticTax.title: Automatic Tax Calculations
paragraphs: Leverage Stripe Tax to handle complex tax rules and rates for any region. The integration ensures accurate, up-to-date tax calculations for each invoice, removing the guesswork and reducing compliance risks.

securePayments.title: Secure and Flexible Payments
paragraphs: Collect payments quickly and securely via Stripe's trusted payment gateway. Your customers can choose from various payment methods - credit card, ACH, and more - to improve the overall customer experience and speed up cash flow.

razorpay.name: Razorpay
razorpay.description: Accept, process and disburse payments using our native connector to Razorpay.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Razorpay app enables invoicing, tax calculations, and payment collection directly through Razorpay. Integrate it seamlessly with Flexprice (or your billing engine) to streamline your payment workflows.

razorpayInvoicing.title: Razorpay Invoicing
paragraphs: Create and send invoices with a few clicks - right from Flexprice - using Razorpay's invoicing capabilities. Payment collection can be automated, reducing manual follow-ups.

automaticTax.title: Automatic Tax Calculations
paragraphs: Leverage Razorpay's support for regional tax rules (e.g., GST in India). This integration ensures accurate, up-to-date tax rates for each invoice, minimizing compliance risks and manual calculations.

securePayments.title: Secure and Flexible Payments
paragraphs: Collect payments quickly and securely via Razorpay's trusted payment gateway. Your customers can choose from various methods - credit cards, debit cards, net banking, UPI, and wallets - enhancing the payment experience and accelerating cash flow.

chargebee.name: Chargebee
chargebee.description: Sync invoices and charges/prices between Flexprice and Chargebee for seamless billing operations.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Chargebee app enables seamless synchronization of invoices and charges/prices between Flexprice and Chargebee. Integrate it to streamline your billing workflows.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Sync invoices from Flexprice to Chargebee, ensuring your billing system stays up to date with the latest invoice data.

chargePriceSync.title: Charge and Price Sync
paragraphs: Synchronize charges and prices between Flexprice and Chargebee to maintain consistency across your billing platform.

hubspot.name: Hubspot
hubspot.description: Hubspot is a CRM, sales, marketing and customer service platform.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice HubSpot app enables seamless syncing of deals, invoices, customers, and payments between HubSpot and Flexprice.

dealLineItems.title: Deal Line Items Sync
paragraphs: Automatically sync deal line items from HubSpot to Flexprice, ensuring accurate revenue tracking and billing.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Push invoices from Flexprice to HubSpot to keep your CRM up to date with billing information.

customerSync.title: Customer Sync
paragraphs: Sync customer data between HubSpot and Flexprice to maintain a single source of truth for customer information.

paymentsSync.title: Payments Sync
paragraphs: Keep payment records synchronized between both platforms for accurate financial reporting.

revenueReporting.title: Revenue Calculations on HubSpot
paragraphs: Leverage HubSpot's reporting capabilities with accurate revenue data synced from Flexprice.

salesforce.name: Salesforce
salesforce.description: Salesforce is a customer relationship management (CRM) platform.

paypal.name: PayPal
paypal.description: PayPal is an online payment system that supports online money transfers.

zoho.name: Zoho
zoho.description: The Zoho Books integration lets you manage critical accounting tasks directly from Flexprice.

createCustomer.title: Create Customer in Zoho Books
paragraphs: Automatically create or update customers in Zoho Books whenever a new customer is added or modified in Flexprice.

createInvoice.title: Create Invoice in Zoho Books
paragraphs: Generate Zoho Books invoices seamlessly from Flexprice usage data or billing triggers, reducing manual work.

transformInvoice.title: Transform Flexprice Invoice to Zoho Books Invoice
paragraphs: Convert a Flexprice invoice object into Zoho Books' invoice format - streamlining data flow and ensuring accuracy.

quickbooks.name: QuickBooks
quickbooks.description: Sync plans, customers, and invoices from Flexprice to QuickBooks Online for seamless accounting operations.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice QuickBooks integration enables one-way sync from Flexprice to QuickBooks Online. Automatically sync plans, customers, and invoices to keep your accounting system up to date.

planPriceSync.title: Plan/Price Sync
paragraphs: Automatically create QuickBooks Items (Service type) when plans are created in Flexprice. Each price is mapped to a QuickBooks Item for accurate invoice line items.

customerSync.title: Customer Sync
paragraphs: Customers are automatically created in QuickBooks when invoices are synced. Customer data including name, email, and billing address is synchronized.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Automatically sync invoices from Flexprice to QuickBooks Online. Invoice line items are mapped to QuickBooks Items, ensuring accurate accounting records.

tokenRefresh.title: Automatic Token Refresh
paragraphs: OAuth tokens are automatically refreshed by the backend when they expire, ensuring uninterrupted sync operations without manual intervention.

nomod.name: Nomod
nomod.description: Send invoices and collect payments using payment links through Nomod integration.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Nomod app enables invoicing and payment collection through Nomod payment links. Integrate it seamlessly with Flexprice to streamline your payment workflows.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Create and send invoices with payment links through Nomod directly from Flexprice. Payment collection can be automated through Nomod payment links.

paymentLinks.title: Payment Links
paragraphs: Generate secure payment links for your invoices using Nomod. Your customers can pay quickly and securely through various payment methods supported by Nomod.

webhooks.title: Webhook Integration
paragraphs: Receive real-time notifications about invoice and payment link events through webhooks. Stay updated on payment status, invoice creation, and more.

moyasar.name: Moyasar
moyasar.description: Send invoices and collect payments using Moyasar payment gateway integration.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Moyasar app enables invoicing and payment collection through Moyasar payment gateway. Integrate it seamlessly with Flexprice to streamline your payment workflows.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Create and send invoices through Moyasar directly from Flexprice. Payment collection can be automated through Moyasar payment gateway.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
paragraphs: Collect payments quickly and securely via Moyasar payment gateway. Your customers can choose from various payment methods to improve the overall customer experience and speed up cash flow.

webhooks.title: Webhook Integration
paragraphs: Receive real-time notifications about payment events through webhooks. Subscribe to payment_paid event to stay updated on payment status.

paddle.name: Paddle
paddle.description: Send invoices and collect payments using Paddle payment gateway integration.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Flexprice Paddle app enables invoicing and payment collection through Paddle payment gateway. Integrate it seamlessly with Flexprice to streamline your payment workflows.

invoiceSync.title: Invoice Sync
paragraphs: Create and send invoices through Paddle directly from Flexprice. Payment collection can be automated through Paddle payment gateway.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
paragraphs: Collect payments quickly and securely via Paddle payment gateway. Your customers can choose from various payment methods to improve the overall customer experience and speed up cash flow.

webhooksPaddle.title: Webhook Integration
paragraphs: Receive real-time notifications about payment events through webhooks. Subscribe to transactions.completed event to stay updated on payment status.

copy.plansDescription: Including all prices, entitlements, and credit grants attached to each plan
copy.excludedLead: Draft entities, archived entities, customers, subscriptions, invoices, and wallet balances are

copy.noteAsyncOnly: Features and plans are cloned in the background and may take a few seconds to appear.
copy.toastStarted: Environment clone started — features and plans are being copied in the background.

region.benefitUs2: Easier to comply with some US regulations
